title: aSPARK-policy project/org-level policy.yaml
description: A project or organization policy activation file, per FORMAT-REFERENCE.md §1. Distinct from a pack's own bare-rules policy.yaml fragment (see pack-policy.schema.json).

ruleBlock.description: A rule domain block (e.g. `security`, `code.java`). Structurally an open mapping; only `final` carries a fixed meaning (FORMAT-REFERENCE.md §1.1). No domain-specific sub-key is validated (§6).
